meaning: n.卡车,敞棚货车,(车站)搬行李用的手推车,交易,交换,废话,废物,实物工资vt.交易,交往,以卡车运输vi.驾驶卡车,以物易物adj.<主美>运货汽车的
examples: They hitched a ride in a truck.
I've just loaded my truck up.
The truck braked to a halt.
As Arnold goes to fetch the truck, I take a moment to soak in the scenery.
The article 'The LA food truck revival' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
